episode.title: MTGFast Finance Ep 462: Tariff Wars
episode.description: James and Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch, and go over the Trump tariff wars and the upcoming Secret Lair Winter Superdrop.
